summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT derivation walk from det(A-λI)=0 for 2×2 A=[[a,b],[c,d]]: λ²-(a+d)λ+(ad-bc)=0 → m = tr/2, p = det → λ = m ± sqrt(m²-p), final GREEN equation in SurroundingRectangle. RIGHT three worked examples: symmetric [[2,1],[1,2]] → (3, 1), mixed [[3,-1],[2,0]] → (2.56, 0.44), rotation [[0,-1],[1,0]] → 0 ± i. Each example card has the matrix, m/p, and the λ values.
